items.title: edureka! · YouTube监控
items.titleOriginal: Build Autonomous AI Agents That Think and Act | Learn  LLMs, MCP & RAG | Edureka  Live
items.titleZh: 构建能够思考和行动的自主人工智能代理 |学习 LLM、MCP 和 RAG |教育现场
items.summary:
🔥Gen AI 和 ML 研究生课程 https://www.edureka.co/executive-programs/pgp-generative-ai-machine-learning-certification-training
🔥 数据科学与人工智能综合 MS+PGP 课程 https://www.edureka.co/dual-certification-programs/ms-data-science-pgp-gen-ai-ml-birchwood
🚀 加入我们，参加激动人心的现场会议，了解如何构建自主 AI 代理，这些代理可以在最少的人工干预下进行推理、决策、使用工具和执行任务。

在这个实践研讨会中，您将探索 Agentic AI 的基础，了解现代 AI 代理的工作原理，并了解 LLM、RAG 和 MCP 等技术如何在实际用例中实现智能自动化。

✅ 你将学到什么：
...
items.summaryOriginal:
🔥Post Graduate Program in Gen AI and ML https://www.edureka.co/executive-programs/pgp-generative-ai-machine-learning-certification-training
🔥 Integrated MS+PGP Program in Data Science & AI https://www.edureka.co/dual-certification-programs/ms-data-science-pgp-gen-ai-ml-birchwood
🚀 Join us for an exciting live session and learn how to build Autonomous AI Agents that can reason, make decisions, use tools, and perform tasks with minimal human intervention.

In this hands-on workshop, you'll explore the foundations of Agentic AI, understand how modern AI Agents work, and see how technologies like LLMs, RAG, and MCP enable intelligent automation across real-world use cases.

✅ What You'll Learn:
...

items.summary:
🔥GenAI 高级 DevOps 认证培训：https://www.edureka.co/devops-certification-training
这个 Edureka 𝐊𝐮𝐛𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐞𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐣𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐬 视频将帮助您在 Docker 上创建、运行和共享容器映像。接下来，我们将使用 minikube 设置 Kubernetes 集群，最后在 Kubernetes 上运行我们的第一个应用程序。

🔵Kubernetes 全程视频：https://youtu.be/YXfLAWGTI38
🔴订阅我们的频道以获取 Kubernetes 完整课程的更新。点击上面的订阅按钮：https://goo.gl/6ohpTV

🔴推特：https://twitter.com/edurekain
🔵 领英：https://www.linkedin.com/company/edureka
🔴Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/edureka_learning/
🔵脸书：https://www.facebook.co...
items.summaryOriginal:
🔥Advanced DevOps Certification Training with GenAI : https://www.edureka.co/devops-certification-training
This Edureka 𝐊𝐮𝐛𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐞𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐣𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐬 video will help you create, run and share a Container Image on Docker. Moving on, we will set up a Kubernetes Cluster using minikube and finally, run our First Application on Kubernetes.

🔵Kubernetes Full-course video: https://youtu.be/YXfLAWGTI38
🔴Subscribe to our channel to get updates on Kubernetes Full Course. Hit the subscribe button above: https://goo.gl/6ohpTV

🔴  Twitter: https://twitter.com/edurekain
🔵  LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/edureka
🔴  Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/edureka_learning/
🔵  Facebook: https://www.facebook.co...
